name: Deck superclass
definition: Rollup for all decking assemblies; classifier-only

name: Wire deck
definition: Mesh + support members; all edge/attachment variants via configuration

name: Upright frame
definition: Columns + bracing (+ base plates) as a braced frame

name: Work platform
definition: Elevated platform assembly (rack-supported or freestanding via family)

name: Guarding assembly
definition: Guard rail systems; mesh partitions; protector systems
